description: Common definitions shared across parsed OCS TMOV messages

tmovCommonBase.$comment: Shared fields for all TMOV messages

counter.description: Message sequence counter, which is unique for a given thread/client connection. This number can be used to detect if a command has been missed. This number is reset after midnight each night.
counter.$comment: TODO: Document counter behavior within transitline/message types.

timestamp.description: RFC3339 timestamp when this event occurred

transitLine.description: Single character describing transit line. (R = Red, O = Orange, B = Blue, G = Green)

trainUid.description: Unique ID for the occupancy moving around the system. Only unique within a Transit Line.

tmovCommonAdditional.$comment: Additional fields for TMOV heavy and light rail messages

trainTag.description: Train tag: Non-revenue, Revenue, Express (revenue) or Big Red (revenue)

leadCar.description: Lead car number, as represented internally in OCS, which may differ from the number displayed on a physical train car. Example: For a red line car physically numbered 15xx, internally numbered 25xx, this field would contain 25xx.
leadCar.$comment: TODO: Should this just be an integer.

leadCarDisplay.description: Lead car number, as displayed on the physical vehicle. Example: For a red line car physically numbered 15xx, internally numbered 25xx, this field would contain 15xx.
leadCarDisplay.$comment: TODO: Should this just be an integer.

dispatchTags.description: A set of tags that dispatchers can assign to trains.

tschCommonBase.$comment: Shared fields for all TSCH messages

counter.description: Message sequence counter, which is unique for a given thread/client connection. This number can be used to detect if a command has been missed. This number is reset after midnight each night.
counter.$comment: TODO: Document counter behavior within transitline/message types.

timestamp.description: RFC3339 timestamp when this event occurred

transitLine.description: Single character describing transit line. (R = Red, O = Orange, B = Blue)
